Game Collection App

Privacy Policy & Terms

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Information We Collect

We only store the data you voluntarily enter into the app, including:

  • Games
  • Consoles
  • Accessories
  • Wishlist items
  • Account authentication details

2. How We Use Data

Your data is used solely to provide app functionality and improve your experience. We do not sell or share your personal data.

3. Authentication

Authentication is handled securely using Firebase Authentication (email/password or Google login).

4. Data Storage

Your data is securely stored using Firebase Firestore cloud services. We take reasonable steps to protect your data.

5. Your Rights

You may delete your account and associated data at any time within the app.

6. Future Advertising

Game Collection may display advertisements in future versions of the app. These ads may be provided by third-party advertising partners such as Google AdMob.

These services may collect:

  • Anonymous usage data
  • Device information
  • General location (non-precise)
  • App interaction data

This data is used to provide relevant advertisements. We do not share your personal collection data (games, consoles, wishlist) with advertisers.

7. Analytics

We may use anonymous analytics tools to understand how users interact with the app, helping us improve features and performance.

8. Terms of Use

This app is provided "as is" without warranties. You are responsible for the accuracy of the data you enter.

9. Limitation of Liability

We are not liable for any loss of data or damages resulting from use of the app.

10. Account Deletion

You may delete your account at any time using the delete account feature within the app. This will permanently remove your stored data.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.

12. Contact

If you have any questions, contact:

igor.shiota@gmail.com

Game Collection App — Version 1.0.0
